subject: Cloud Computing
title: The Pizza Analogy of Cloud
description: One-minute skill: The Pizza Analogy of Cloud.

hook.text: Cloud service models are like pizza. You can make it from scratch, buy it premade, or have it delivered.

buildup.text: IaaS gives you the oven and ingredients. PaaS gives you dough and toppings. SaaS delivers the pizza.

discovery.text: Each model trades control for convenience. More managed means less work but also fewer choices.

twist.text: Most companies use all three models simultaneously. Different problems need different levels of control.

climax.text: There's no single right model. The best choice depends on what you're building and who's building it.

punchline.text: Cloud models: pick how much you want to cook yourself.

quiz.question: What is the core trade-off across cloud service models?
options: More managed services mean less work but also less control
Higher service levels always cost more money
IaaS is always better because it offers the most control
